title: Official population statistics and the Human Mortality Database estimates of populations aged 80+ in Germany and nine other European countries
abstract: A systematic comparison of the Human Mortality Database and official estimates of populations aged 80+ is presented. We consider statistical series for East and West Germany and also for Denmark, England and Wales, France, Finland, Hungary, the Netherl
authors_text: Jdanov, Dmitri A.; Scholz, Rembrandt D.; Shkolnikov, Vladimir
